{"settings":"{
	"[css,graphql,html,pcss,postcss,scss,javascript,javascriptreact,less,markdown,mdx,postcss,python,react,svelte,reactnative,scss,sh,typescript,typescriptreact,xml,yaml]": {
		"editor.defaultFormatter": "biomejs.biome",
		"editor.formatOnSave": true
	},
	"[svg]": {
		"editor.defaultFormatter": "biomejs.biome"
	},
	"[vue]": {
		"editor.defaultFormatter": "biomejs.biome"
	},
	"[json,json5,jsonc]": {
		"editor.defaultFormatter": "vscode.json-language-features"
	},
	"[php]": {
		"editor.defaultFormatter": "biomejs.biome"
	},
	"editor.defaultFormatter": "biomejs.biome",
	"chat.fontFamily": "default",
	"editor.fontFamily": "CaskaydiaCove Nerd Font",
	"terminal.integrated.fontFamily": "CaskaydiaCove Nerd Font Mono",
	"github.copilot.chat.localeOverride": "en",
	"github.copilot.chat.scopeSelection": true,
	"github.copilot.chat.codesearch.enabled": true,
	"github.copilot.chat.agent.thinkingTool": true,
	"github.copilot.nextEditSuggestions.enabled": true,
	"github.copilot.chat.languageContext.fix.typescript.enabled": true,
	"github.copilot.chat.languageContext.inline.typescript.enabled": true,
	"github.copilot.chat.languageContext.typescript.enabled": true,
	"github.copilot.nextEditSuggestions.fixes": true,
	"github.copilot.chat.editor.temporalContext.enabled": true,
	"explorer.fileNesting.enabled": true,
	"explorer.fileNesting.patterns": {
		"tsconfig.json": "tsconfig.*.json, env.d.ts",
		"vite.config.*": "jsconfig*, vitest.config.*, cypress.config.*, playwright.config.*",
		"package.json": "package-lock.json, pnpm*, .yarnrc*, yarn*, .eslint*, eslint*, .oxlint*, oxlint*,tailwind.config.*, .prettier*, prettier*, .editorconfig, mise*, postcs*, ",
		"next.config.*": "next-env.d.ts, next-i18next.config.js, next-sitemap.config.js, next-seo.config.js, next.config.*.ts, components.json"
	},
	"window.customTitleBarVisibility": "auto",
	"files.trimTrailingWhitespace": true,
	"security.workspace.trust.untrustedFiles": "open",
	"workbench.tree.indent": 12,
	"workbench.tree.renderIndentGuides": "always",
	"workbench.colorCustomizations": {
		"tree.indentGuidesStroke": "#008070"
	},
	"workbench.sideBar.location": "right",
	"workbench.startupEditor": "none",
	"workbench.editor.labelFormat": "short",
	"workbench.editorAssociations": {
		"*.svg": "default",
		"git-rebase-todo": "gitlens.rebase"
	},
	"workbench.activityBar.location": "top",
	"editor.tabCompletion": "on",
	"editor.occurrencesHighlight": "off",
	"editor.selectionHighlight": false,
	"editor.suggestOnTriggerCharacters": false,
	"editor.guides.bracketPairs": true,
	"editor.guides.highlightActiveIndentation": true,
	"editor.guides.indentation": true,
	"editor.quickSuggestions": {
		"other": false,
		"comments": false,
		"strings": true
	},
	"editor.codeActionsOnSave": {
		"source.fixAll": "explicit"
	},
	"editor.suggestSelection": "first",
	"editor.tabSize": 2,
	"editor.useTabStops": false,
	"editor.lineNumbers": "relative",
	"editor.wordWrap": "on",
	"editor.fontWeight": "400",
	"editor.fontLigatures": true,
	"editor.formatOnSave": true,
	"editor.inlineSuggest.enabled": true,
	"editor.bracketPairColorization.enabled": true,
	"editor.minimap.enabled": true,
	"editor.stickyScroll.enabled": true,
	"explorer.sortOrder": "filesFirst",
	"explorer.confirmDelete": false,
	"files.associations": {
		"*.css": "tailwindcss",
		"*.pcss": "tailwindcss"
	},
	"css.validate": false,
	"files.exclude": {
		"**/.classpath": true,
		"**/.project": true,
		"**/.settings": true,
		"**/.factorypath": true
	},
	"git.openRepositoryInParentFolders": "always",
	"git.ignoreMissingGitWarning": true,
	"git.autofetch": true,
	"git.confirmSync": false,
	"git.enableSmartCommit": true,
	"git-autoconfig.configList": [
		{
			"user.email": "dev.testing785@gmail.com",
			"user.name": "motionbees-developer"

			"cva\\(([^)]*)\\)",
			"[\"'`]([^\"'`]*).*?[\"'`]"
		],
		[

			"(?:'|\"|`)([^']*)(?:'|\"|`)"
		],
		[
			"clsx\\(([^)]*)\\)",
			"(?:'|\"|`)([^']*)(?:'|\"|`)"

	"terminal.integrated.defaultProfile.linux": "zsh",

			]
		}
	},
	"terminal.integrated.automationProfile.linux": {

		"args": [
			"-l"
		]
	},
	"terminal.integrated.inheritEnv": true,
	"terminal.integrated.gpuAcceleration": "auto",
	"vsicons.dontShowNewVersionMessage": true,
	"better-comments.highlightPlainText": true,
	"better-comments.tags": [
		{
			"tag": "!",
			"color": "#FF2D00",
			"strikethrough": false,
			"underline": false,
			"backgroundColor": "transparent",
			"bold": false,
			"italic": false
		},
		{
			"tag": "?",
			"color": "#3498DB",
			"strikethrough": false,
			"underline": false,
			"backgroundColor": "transparent",
			"bold": false,
			"italic": false
		},
		{
			"tag": "//",
			"color": "#595F72",
			"strikethrough": true,
			"underline": false,
			"backgroundColor": "transparent",
			"bold": false,
			"italic": false
		},
		{
			"tag": "todo",
			"color": "#FF8C00",
			"strikethrough": false,
			"underline": false,
			"backgroundColor": "transparent",
			"bold": false,
			"italic": false
		},
		{
			"tag": "*",
			"color": "#84A07C"
		},
		{
			"tag": "* @param",
			"color": "#575D90"
		}
	],
	"gitlens.defaultDateLocale": null,
	"gitlens.currentLine.enabled": false,
	"cSpell.enabledFileTypes": {
		"go": false,
		"shellscript": false,
		"toml": false
	},
	"githubPullRequests.fileListLayout": "tree",
	"githubPullRequests.pullBranch": "never",
	"githubPullRequests.pushBranch": "always",
	"emmet.triggerExpansionOnTab": true,
	"emmet.useInlineCompletions": true,

		"javascript": "javascriptreact",
		"liquid": "html"

	"diffEditor.ignoreTrimWhitespace": true,

	"tailwind-raw-reorder.classRegex": {
		"jade": [
			{
				"regex": "\\.([\\._a-zA-Z0-9\\-]+)",
				"separator": "\\.",
				"replacement": "."
			},
			"\\bclass\\s*=\\s*[\\\"\\']([\\._a-zA-Z0-9\\s\\-\\:\\/]+)[\\\"\\']"
		],
		"html": [
			[
				"\\sclass=(([\"'`])(?:(?:[^{}<>](?!\\2))|\\\\\\2)+[^{}<>])\\2",
				"[\"'`]([^]+)"
			]
		],
		"css": "\\B@apply\\s+([\\._a-zA-Z0-9\\s\\-\\:\\/]+);",
		"javascript": [
			[
				"((?:class(?:Name)?|tw)\\s*=\\s*([\"'`])(?:(?:[^{}<>](?!\\2))|\\\\\\2)+[^{}<>]\\2)",
				"(?:class(?:Name)?|tw)\\s*=\\s*(([\"'`])(?:(?:[^{}<>](?!\\2))|\\\\\\2)+[^{}<>])\\2",
				"[\"'`]([^]+)"
			]
		],
		"javascriptreact": [
			[
				"((?:class(?:Name)?|tw)\\s*=\\s*{?([\"'`])(?:(?:[^{}<>](?!\\2))|\\\\\\2)+[^{}<>]\\2)",
				"(?:class(?:Name)?|tw)\\s*=\\s*{?(([\"'`])(?:(?:[^{}<>](?!\\2))|\\\\\\2)+[^{}<>])\\2",
				"[\"'`]([^]+)"
			]
		],
		"typescript": [
			[
				"((?:class(?:Name)?|tw)\\s*=\\s*([\"'`])(?:(?:[^{}<>](?!\\2))|\\\\\\2)+[^{}<>]\\2)",
				"(?:class(?:Name)?|tw)\\s*=\\s*(([\"'`])(?:(?:[^{}<>](?!\\2))|\\\\\\2)+[^{}<>])\\2",
				"[\"'`]([^]+)"
			]
		],
		"typescriptreact": [
			[
				"((?:class(?:Name)?|tw)\\s*=\\s*{?([\"'`])(?:(?:[^{}<>](?!\\2))|\\\\\\2)+[^{}<>]\\2)",
				"(?:class(?:Name)?|tw)\\s*=\\s*{?(([\"'`])(?:(?:[^{}<>](?!\\2))|\\\\\\2)+[^{}<>])\\2",
				"[\"'`]([^]+)"
			]
		],
		"php": [
			[
				"\\sclass=(([\"'`])(?:(?:[^{}<>](?!\\2))|\\\\\\2)+[^{}<>])\\2",
				"[\"'`]([^]+)"
			]
		]
	},

	"vim.insertModeKeyBindings": [

			]
		},
		{
			"before": [
				"<leader>",
				"<tab>"
			],
			"commands": [

		},
		{
			"before": [
				"<leader>",
				"<enter>"
			],
			"commands": [
				"workbench.action.showCommands"
			]
		}
	],
